special_mechanics.name: Party-Based Movement
special_mechanics.description: Player controls four characters (expandable to six via NPC recruitment) in first-person perspective dungeon navigation

special_mechanics.name: First-Person 3D Dungeon Navigation
special_mechanics.description: Point-and-click interface for character movement through 3D-rendered dungeon space, similar to Dungeon Master

tier_notes: Eye of the Beholder is an RPG/dungeon crawler where movement mechanics are fundamentally different from platformers. No documented player physics parameters (gravity, jump velocity, acceleration) exist in available sources. The game features party-based first-person dungeon navigation rather than direct character platforming physics. Movement appears grid or turn-based rather than continuous physics-driven.
